blended.narrative: Blue Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
